headline: Is Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) A Potential Opportunity After A 45% One-Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Alexandria Real Estate Equities is simply beaten down or genuinely cheap, the current share price of US$49.52 puts that question front and center. The stock has slipped 1.5% over the last week and 9.0% over the past month, and now sits with a 1.1% year to date return but a 45.6% decline over the last year and a 50.3% and 64.0% decline over the last 3 and 5 years. These moves have kept Alexandria Real Estate Equities in focus for investors looking at real estate...
